name: Felix Mendelssohn
title: Composer
bio: German composer, pianist, and conductor of the early Romantic period. Known for his symphonies, concertos, and oratorios including 'Elijah.'
faith: Raised in a Jewish family that converted to Christianity, Mendelssohn was a devout Lutheran. His oratorio 'Elijah' and symphony 'Reformation' reflect his deep Christian faith. He also revived interest in Bach's sacred works.

sources.title: Felix Mendelssohn — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his Christian faith and sacred compositions

tagline: Revived Bach's sacred masterworks and composed the oratorio Elijah
